---
title: "Central America Trip — March 2026"
subtitle: "Guatemala & Belize | March 15–25, 2026"
date: "March 1, 2026"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
**Before you leave home:** Print and sign the ATM Cave liability waiver (front and back, single sheet only) and complete the NICH visitor information form. Both are required at Mayawalk check-in on March 18. Links in the [Mayawalk confirmation email](mailto:reservations@mayawalk.com).
:::

---

## Day-by-Day Itinerary

### Sunday, March 15 — Travel Day (Grand Rapids → Tikal)

**Flight 1 — United UA 2099**

- Depart: GRR (Grand Rapids) at **7:25 AM**
- Arrive: ORD (Chicago O'Hare) at **7:37 AM**
- Connection: 1h 24m

**Flight 2 — United UA 2006**

- Depart: ORD (Chicago) at **9:01 AM**
- Arrive: GUA (Guatemala City) at **12:41 PM**

::: {.callout-warning}
**Tight connection in Guatemala City:** ~2 hours between landing and TagAirlines check-in at 2:40 PM. Clear customs and immigration quickly — do not check bags through to Flores if possible.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
**Cash:** Pull Q800 from the ATM at Guatemala City airport on arrival — covers the hostel plus meals in Flores.
:::

**Flight 3 — TagAirlines 5U150**

- Check-in: **2:40 PM** at GUA
- Depart: GUA at **4:10 PM**
- Arrive: FRS (Flores) at **5:10 PM**

*Evening: Arrive FRS ~5:10 PM. Take lodge shuttle to Tikal (~1 hr). Check in, dinner at the lodge, sleep to howler monkeys.*

**Jungle Lodge — Reservation #2041175675302**

- Status: ⚠️ Pending confirmation — follow-up email sent March 8
- Payment: $132.98 total (room $109 + taxes) — charged in full ~March 10 (5 days before arrival). **Free cancellation until March 10 only — no refund after.**
- Check-in: 3:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Shuttle: FRS airport → lodge ($19/person one-way, shared van, max 12 people) — awaiting confirmation
- Contact: [info@junglelodgetikal.com](mailto:info@junglelodgetikal.com) | +502 7861 0447

---

### Monday, March 16 — Tikal National Park → Flores

- **4:00–8:00 AM — Sunrise Tour** ($16/person + ~$20 park entry cash at gate) — confirm with hotel
- Full morning in the ruins — climb temples, explore the jungle, watch for wildlife
- **Check out by 11:00 AM** — shuttle from lodge to Flores island (~1 hr)
- Check into **Los Amigos Hostel** — Booking ID #45456, pay Q600 cash at check-in
  - Check-in: 1:00 PM | Check-out: 10:00 AM
  - Contact: [amigoshostel@gmail.com](mailto:amigoshostel@gmail.com) · +502 4495 2399
  - Cancellation: free if cancelled 48+ hours prior — call to cancel, don't just no-show
- King room with lake and jungle views, private bathroom
- Evening: lakeside dinner at the Secret Garden resto-bar (in the hostel, #1 on TripAdvisor)

::: {.callout-tip}
**Tonight:** Book your Flores → San Ignacio shuttle through the Los Amigos travel agency — they sell bus tickets in all directions, open until 10 PM. Shuttles depart from Santa Elena and fill up — easiest to arrange here.
:::

---

### Tuesday, March 17 — Flores → San Ignacio, Belize

- Morning: Shuttle from Flores/Santa Elena toward the Belize border (~$25-35, 3-4 hrs including border crossing)
- Cross at **Benque Viejo / Melchor de Mencos**
- Arrive San Ignacio — check into **Bella's Backpackers**, Booking #44298
  - 4 Galves St, San Ignacio | Private room with private bathroom
  - WhatsApp: +501 632-8868
- Afternoon: Take it easy or pick one activity:
  - **Cahal Pech ruins** — walking distance, small well-preserved Mayan site, easy half day
  - **Xunantunich ruins** — 30 min away, massive site with El Castillo pyramid and incredible views, hand-cranked river ferry
  - **Tubing on the Macal or Mopan River** — lazy jungle float, great way to meet people

---

### Wednesday, March 18 — ATM Cave (Actun Tunichil Muknal)

**Mayawalk Tours — Order #R0SAMLP** ✅ Confirmed

- Meet at Mayawalk office, **19 Burns Avenue, San Ignacio** at **7:30 AM** (between Tandoor Restaurant and Belize Bank)
- 45-min drive to Tapir Mountain Nature Reserve, 45-min jungle hike to cave entrance
- ~3 hours inside — swimming, wading, climbing through chambers to the Crystal Maiden
- Lunch included (non-vegetarian), back in San Ignacio by ~4:30 PM
- Balance due on day: **$73.77**

::: {.callout-tip}
**What to wear/bring:**

- Hiking shoes/trainers with closed toes (will get wet) + flip flops to change into
- Socks (mandatory)
- Shorts and shirt — **no sleeveless shirts, tank tops, or bikini tops** (dress code enforced)
- Extra dry clothes for after
- Small backpack, reusable water bottle, bug spray, snacks
- Printed waiver (front and back on one sheet) + valid ID
- No cameras or electronics — government ban. Stock photos emailed to you afterward from the Mayawalk office.
:::

---

### Thursday, March 19 — San Ignacio → Caye Caulker

- **Check out of Bella's Backpackers** by agreed time
- **Morning** — Shuttle from San Ignacio to Belize City Marine Terminal ⚠️ Not booked
- **~Midday** — Arrive Belize City, water taxi to Caye Caulker (~45 min) — buy ticket on the day
- **Afternoon** — Check in to overnight accommodation on Caye Caulker ⚠️ Not booked
- Evening: Sunset at The Split, dinner on the island

---

### Friday, March 20 — Caye Caulker (Airbnb check-in)

- **3:00 PM** — Check in at Airbnb hosted by Norm, Playa Asuncion | Confirmation: **HMDYZAD4J2**
- Relax, explore the island

---

### Saturday–Tuesday, March 21–24 — Caye Caulker

*Relax at the Airbnb, dive, and enjoy the island.*

**Diving — Sunrise Scuba** ⚠️ Booking requested — awaiting deposit instructions

Contact: Marilyn · [sunrisescubabz@gmail.com](mailto:sunrisescubabz@gmail.com) · [sunrisescubabelize.com](https://www.sunrisescubabelize.com)

| Date | Dive | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Saturday, March 21 | Esmeralda | ⚠️ Deposit pending |
| Sunday, March 22 | Local Reef | ⚠️ Deposit pending |
| Monday, March 23 | Blue Hole | ⚠️ Deposit pending |
| Tuesday, March 24 | *(not booked)* | — |

::: {.callout-warning}
**Deposit required to hold spots.** Booking request sent to Marilyn on March 8 for March 21–23. Awaiting deposit payment instructions. Spots not confirmed until deposit is paid. All trips subject to change/cancellation due to weather, minimum diver requirements, or other conditions.
:::

**Other activities:**

- Snorkeling at Hol Chan Marine Reserve & Shark Ray Alley
- The Split — swimming, cold drinks, good people-watching

---

### Wednesday, March 25 — Fly Home

- **Check out: 10:00 AM** from Airbnb
- **~11:00–11:30 AM** — Water taxi: Caye Caulker → Belize City (~45 min)
- **~12:15–12:30 PM** — Arrive Belize City, transfer to Philip Goldson International Airport (BZE)

**Flight 1 — American Airlines AA 356**

- Depart: BZE at **1:50 PM**
- Arrive: MIA (Miami) at **6:05 PM**
- Seat: 23F | Connection: 1h 54m

**Flight 2 — American Airlines AA 1678**

- Depart: MIA at **7:59 PM**
- Arrive: GRR (Grand Rapids) at **11:28 PM**
- Seat: 23F | Food for purchase

---

## Still To Book

- [ ] **Jungle Lodge — awaiting reply** — emailed March 1, WhatsApp sent March 8 (+502 3185 0223, auto-reply received, expect response Monday). Need to: confirm reservation, book FRS → lodge shuttle ($19/person), lodge → Flores transfer, and Sunrise Tour ($16/person, park entry ~$20 cash at gate). **Must resolve before March 10 cancellation deadline.**
- [ ] **Flores → San Ignacio shuttle, March 17** — asked Amber at Bella's (awaiting reply). Alternate: book at Los Amigos front desk March 16 evening
- [ ] **San Ignacio → Belize City Marine Terminal shuttle, March 19** — asked Amber at Bella's (awaiting reply). Timing-sensitive — need enough buffer to catch the water taxi. Alternates if Bella's can't do it:
  - **William's Belize Shuttle** — [williamshuttlebelize.com](https://williamshuttlebelize.com)
  - **San Ignacio Shuttles** (Sergio/Jamie) — [sanignacioshuttles.com](https://www.sanignacioshuttles.com)
- [ ] **March 19 overnight on Caye Caulker** — asked Amber about Bella's Caye Caulker sister hostel (discount available as Bella's guest). Alternate: **DreamCabanas** (9.2 score, 309 reviews, ~$110/night)
- [ ] **Sunrise Scuba deposit** — booking request sent March 8. Awaiting Marilyn's reply with deposit instructions. Pay promptly to confirm March 21 (Esmeralda), March 22 (Local Reef), March 23 (Blue Hole)
- [ ] Water taxi Belize City → Caye Caulker (March 19) — buy on the day at the Marine Terminal. Two operators: **Water Jets International** and **Caye Caulker Water Taxi Association**. Ask about the express option (~30 min vs standard ~45 min)

---

## Bookings at a Glance

| Booking | Confirmation | Details |
|---|---|---|
| United Airlines (GRR → GUA) | **O0P1XY** | March 15 |
| TagAirlines (GUA → FRS) | **00IZ4F** | March 15 |
| Jungle Lodge, Tikal | **2041175675302** | March 15–16 ⚠️ Pending confirmation |
| Los Amigos Hostel, Flores | **45456** | March 16–17, pay Q600 cash |
| Bella's Backpackers, San Ignacio | **44298** | March 17–19 (checkout March 19) |
| Caye Caulker — March 19 night | ⚠️ Not booked | Bella's CC (discount via Amber) or DreamCabanas |
| Mayawalk Tours — ATM Cave | **R0SAMLP** | March 18, 8:00 AM |
| Airbnb – Caye Caulker | **HMDYZAD4J2** | March 20–25, hosted by Norm |
| Sunrise Scuba — 3 dives | ⚠️ Deposit pending | Mar 21 Esmeralda · Mar 22 Local Reef · Mar 23 Blue Hole |
| American Airlines (BZE → GRR) | **DZGOPI** | March 25 |

---

## Key Contacts

| | Confirmation / Contact | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| United Airlines | O0P1XY | GRR→GUA, March 15 |
| TagAirlines | 00IZ4F | GUA→FRS, March 15 |
| Jungle Lodge | 2041175675302 | [info@junglelodgetikal.com](mailto:info@junglelodgetikal.com) · WhatsApp +502 3185 0223 |
| Los Amigos Hostel | 45456 | Flores, pay Q600 cash |
| Bella's Backpackers | 44298 | WhatsApp +501 632-8868 |
| Mayawalk Tours | R0SAMLP | [reservations@mayawalk.com](mailto:reservations@mayawalk.com) · +501 824-3070 |
| Airbnb (Caye Caulker) | HMDYZAD4J2 | Hosted by Norm |
| Sunrise Scuba | Marilyn | [sunrisescubabz@gmail.com](mailto:sunrisescubabz@gmail.com) · deposit pending |
| American Airlines | DZGOPI | BZE→GRR, March 25 |

---

## Packing List

### Documents
- [ ] Passport
- [ ] Printed ATM Cave waiver (front and back, **single sheet only**)
- [ ] Completed NICH visitor information form
- [ ] Booking confirmations (digital or printed)
- [ ] Advanced Open Water certification card (for diving)

### Pack Setup
- [ ] Main bag / travel pack
- [ ] Small daypack (for day trips, Tikal, ATM Cave)
- [ ] Dry bag (water taxis, boat dives, ATM Cave)
- [ ] Lightweight packing cubes

### Clothing
- [ ] Quick-dry shirts with sleeves — 3–4 (sleeveless not allowed at ATM Cave)
- [ ] Shorts — 2–3
- [ ] Swimsuit(s) — 2 (one always drying)
- [ ] Light rain jacket or packable layer
- [ ] Quick-dry underwear — 3–4
- [ ] One nicer shirt for dinners out

### Footwear
- [ ] Old closed-toe shoes (ATM Cave — will get completely soaked, don't bring nice ones)
- [ ] Flip flops / sandals

### Toiletries
- [ ] Toothbrush + toothpaste
- [ ] Dr. Bronner's or travel soap (doubles as laundry soap)
- [ ] Deodorant
- [ ] Razor
- [ ] Quick-dry travel towel
- [ ] Reef-safe sunscreen (required for Caye Caulker marine reserve)
- [ ] Lip balm with SPF
- [ ] Bug spray (essential for Tikal and ATM Cave)

### Health & First Aid
- [ ] Personal medications
- [ ] Ibuprofen / acetaminophen
- [ ] Antidiarrheal
- [ ] Blister pads
- [ ] Hand sanitizer
- [ ] Earplugs + eye mask (hostel nights)

### Gear & Accessories
- [ ] Sunglasses
- [ ] Hat
- [ ] Reusable water bottle
- [ ] Camera (not allowed inside ATM Cave — leave at Mayawalk office)
- [ ] Clothesline (useful for drying dive/swim gear)

### Electronics
- [ ] Phone + charger
- [ ] Power bank
- [ ] Dive computer (if you have one)

### Money
- [ ] USD cash — works throughout Belize
- [ ] Guatemalan Quetzales — pull **Q800** from ATM at Guatemala City airport on arrival
  - Q600 for Los Amigos Hostel (pay cash at check-in)
  - Remainder for meals and incidentals in Flores
- [ ] Credit/debit card

---

*Last updated March 8, 2026*
